evals.name: pg_then_execution_gate
evals.prompt: /agent-prompt Add a failing test for packages/claude-dev-env/hooks/blocking/prompt_workflow_validate.py exit code 2 messages, then minimal code to pass. Use TDD.
expected_behavior: Orchestrator runs prompt-generator end-to-end before any execution spawn: discovery and AskUserQuestion behave per prompt-generator; Outcome preview gate appears; final user-visible handoff includes one xml-tagged fence with the full prompt artifact plus ## Outcome digest per TARGET_OUTPUT.md
After that handoff, exactly one AskUserQuestion presents execution approval with subagent type, mode, kebab-case name, and that the subagent prompt will be the finalized XML
AskUserQuestion options include Launch it (recommended), Edit first, and Cancel; Launch it and Edit first previews follow SKILL.md
On Launch it, Agent or Task tool runs with run_in_background true and prompt parameter equal to the approved XML from the fence (no summary substitution)
No second prompt refinement pipeline (six-section refiner, separate compliance audit pass) runs outside prompt-generator’s own internal flow

evals.name: no_spawn_without_approval
evals.prompt: /agent-prompt Run a quick docs pass on skills/prompt-generator/TARGET_OUTPUT.md and open a draft PR.
expected_behavior: No background Agent or Task spawn for execution occurs before the post-handoff AskUserQuestion resolves with Launch it
If the user chose Cancel, no execution spawn; if Edit first, orchestrator returns to execution AskUserQuestion after edits without launching on stale XML

evals.name: edit_first_then_launch
evals.prompt: /agent-prompt Draft a minimal XML handoff for continuing work on skills/agent-prompt/SKILL.md. [After the assistant shows the xml fence and ## Outcome digest, the user says:] Edit first — remove the optional guardrail bullet from the XML. [Then:] Launch it.
expected_behavior: No execution spawn before the post-handoff AskUserQuestion
After Edit first, the assistant shows revised XML (or confirms the edit) and returns to Step 2 AskUserQuestion before spawning
On Launch it, the spawned subagent prompt matches the post-edit XML from the fence, not the pre-edit version
